<xf:selectrow name="fs_usergroup_ids[]" multiple="multiple" size="5" value="{{$tag.fs_usergroup_ids}}"
			  label="{{ phrase('fs_tag_applicable_user_groups') }}"
			  >
	<xf:foreach loop="$userGroups" value="$userGroup">
		<xf:option value="{$userGroup.user_group_id}">{$userGroup.title}</xf:option>
	</xf:foreach>
</xf:selectrow>
